name: apply_patch
label: apply_patch
description: Apply a patch using a stripped-down, file-oriented diff format.
promptSnippet: Apply add, update, delete, and move file edits from a patch
promptGuidelines: Use `apply_patch` to edit file contents or file paths using the Codex apply_patch format.

The patch must start with `*** Begin Patch
` and end with `*** End Patch
`.
Supported hunks are `*** Add File:`, `*** Delete File:`, and `*** Update File:` with optional `*** Move to:`.
Relative paths in the patch are resolved against `workdir` when provided; otherwise, they are resolved against the current working directory. Absolute paths remain unchanged.

patch.description:
Patch to apply. Must start with `*** Begin Patch
` and end with `*** End Patch
`

workdir.description: Optional working directory for resolving relative paths in the patch. If omitted, paths are resolved against the current working directory.
